debug_info.goal: ⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

proof:
let α := ULift Bool
  let β := ULift Unit
  letI cα : Category α := {
    Hom := fun x y => ULift (PLift (x.down = true → y.down = true)),
    id := fun x => ⟨⟨id⟩⟩,
    comp := fun f g => ⟨⟨g.down.down ∘ f.down.down⟩⟩,
    id_comp := fun _ => rfl,
    comp_id := fun _ => rfl,
    assoc := fun _ _ _ => rfl
  }
  letI cβ : Category β := {
    Hom := fun _ _ => ULift (PLift True),
    id := fun _ => ⟨⟨.intro⟩⟩,
    comp := fun _ _ => ⟨⟨.intro⟩⟩,
    id_comp := fun _ => rfl,
    comp_id := fun _ => rfl,
    assoc := fun _ _ _ => rfl
  }
  let F : Functor α β := {
    F := fun _ => ULift.up (),
    homF := fun _ => ⟨⟨.intro⟩⟩,
    map_id := fun _ => rfl,
    map_comp := fun _ _ => rfl
  }
  exists α, β, cα, cβ, F, ULift.up false, ULift.up true, ⟨⟨fun h => by cases h⟩⟩
  constructor
  · intro hf
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hf
    rcases hf with ⟨⟨-, g, -, -⟩, -⟩
    have h := g.down.down rfl
    cases h
  · rw [iso_iff_isIso]
    exact ⟨⟨⟨⟨.intro⟩⟩, ⟨⟨.intro⟩⟩, rfl, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
